rationale: In the citing paper, Heitmann et al. (2020) appears only in a grouped list of studies that have applied the Gaussian copula endogeneity approach. The citation is used to document broad adoption of prior copula methods, not to build hypotheses, import constructs, or interpret results from that specific study. There is no distinct discussion of its visual-design theory, data, or findings in the methodological development of 2sCOPE.
